contest.title: 2025-2026 ICPC, NERC, Northern Eurasia Finals (Unrated, Online Mirror, ICPC Rules, Teams Preferred)

sources.notes: Official NERC tutorial; used to confirm the cell-parity transformation, row propagation, diagonal xor constraints, and 2-SAT reduction.

reference_candidates.notes: 洛谷题解候选来源；只有实际参考后才移动到 sources。

annotation.summary: Construct or reject a set of non-intersecting grid cycles satisfying local frog color constraints.
annotation.constraints: The grid is large enough that the solution must reduce local constraints to a linear-size satisfiability instance.
annotation.core_idea: Put a 0/1 value in each cell indicating whether it is inside an odd number of cycles. A grid edge is in a cycle exactly when adjacent cell values differ. Frog colors give parity constraints on the four neighboring cells, and non-crossing/existence of cycles is equivalent to forbidding all-equal or chessboard 2x2 patterns. Once the top row variables x_j are chosen, all lower rows are forced by row-by-row propagation from frog color equations. Diagonal xor values in every 2x2 square can therefore be expressed as either x_j or not x_j, turning all local constraints, including the bottom row, into clauses on at most two variables. Solve this 2-SAT instance and reconstruct the cycles from adjacent-cell differences.
annotation.complexity: O(rc) variables/clauses and O(rc) implication graph processing.

solution_variants.name: main
solution_variants.summary: Transform cycles to cell parity variables, propagate all cells from the top row, derive 2-variable constraints, solve 2-SAT, then reconstruct boundaries.

tags.evidence: All feasibility constraints are transformed into boolean formulas of at most two top-row variables.
Cycles are represented by parity of cell-inside values and constraints are xor relations.
Given the top row variables, the rest of the grid is determined row by row from local constraints.
Cell values and diagonal constraints are manipulated as xor expressions of top-row boolean variables.
After satisfiability, the actual cycles are reconstructed from differing adjacent cell values.
